Pixel Crawler - Free Pack
Creator: Anokolisa
Contact: AnomalyPixel@gmail.com
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Anokolisa
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Anokolisa

Thousandfold Realms uses a small, derived runtime subset of this pack for the Black Lantern Tavern visual pilot. The repository does not include the complete pack or editable Aseprite source files.

Terms supplied with Pixel Crawler - Free Pack:

1. Credit is not required, but is appreciated.
2. The artwork may be altered in shape, color, or pattern.
3. The assets may not be resold or marketed as an asset pack or standalone final product without the creator's authorization.
4. The assets may be used in commercial products, study projects, and other projects where they are functional.

The creator of the assets has no direct relationship with projects that use them.
